# Athean Trades

> AI-powered prediction-market trading system. A ten-agent council
> deliberates every trade in four rounds; the verdict — whether to
> trade or to refuse — is anchored as a cryptographic witness on
> Circle's Arc Testnet. Discipline becomes auditable. Restraint
> becomes provable alpha.

Athean Trades is a Python + Solidity + Next.js monorepo built around
one conviction: an automated trader's most valuable artefact is the
record of trades it refused. Every Polymarket signal passes through a
structured four-round deliberation between Greek-god-named AI agents
(bulls, bears, risk, execution). The Areopagus court gates the verdict
against constitutional caps and half-Kelly sizing. Approvals route to
the Polymarket CLOB; rejections are anchored on-chain as a
`Restrained` event so any third party can verify the discipline was
paid.

The flagship feature, **Proof of Restraint**, is provably live on
Arc Testnet — first witness recorded at
[block 42,337,549, proof_id=1](https://testnet.arcscan.app/tx/0xf9ae0e7ba73ecaece1af840b20e2ef5a20868df960e62ba238e53a828dfa4edb).

## Quick architecture

- **Pythia** — data oracle (Polymarket CLOB, news, sentiment)
- **Apollo** — 7-dimension signal scoring → A/B/C edge bands
- **Boule** — convenes the 10-agent council; runs 4 deliberation rounds
- **Areopagus** — constitutional gates, half-Kelly sizing, drawdown veto
- **Strategos** — order router (paper + live CLOB)
- **Parthenon** — IPFS + Irys + Merkle archival, on-chain anchor
- **ProofOfRestraint contract** — appends a witness for every refused trade
- **Argos / Ostrakon / Underworld / Olympus** — monitoring, scoring, post-mortems, governance

## The council (10 deliberating agents)

- **Bulls**: Ares, Hades
- **Bears**: Athena (also synthesises round 3), Cassandra
- **Risk**: Zeus ⚡, Solon ⚡ (both have constitutional veto), Themis
- **Execution**: Hephaestus, Daedalus, Humans

Plus 12 orchestrators (Apollo, Boule, Areopagus, Strategos, Argos,
Ostrakon, Parthenon, Pythia, Elysium, Underworld, Moirai, Olympus).

## Live deployment

- **Chain**: Circle Arc Testnet, chain id `5042002`, native USDC gas
- **ProofOfRestraint contract**: [`0x4b35CE4Bf71B976205f60Fda1EBAb82eD4D34895`](https://testnet.arcscan.app/address/0x4b35CE4Bf71B976205f60Fda1EBAb82eD4D34895)
- **Marketing site**: <https://athean-trades.vercel.app>
- **Source**: <https://github.com/NAME0x0/Athean-Trades>

## Stack

- Python 3.12 services, one `uv` env per service
- LLM council pluggable: Anthropic Claude *or* Google Gemini
- Solidity 0.8.24 + Foundry (51 tests, 18 suites, full CI)
- FastAPI gateway, Redis Streams pub/sub, Postgres 16, IPFS Kubo, Irys
- Next.js 14 App Router + shadcn/ui + Cinzel/Cormorant editorial typography
- React-three-fiber 3D scale-of-justice on the landing
- pnpm workspaces + Turborepo
- Vercel for the marketing site, Docker Compose for the rest

## Repository entry points

- [README.md](README.md) — full pitch, badges, mermaid diagrams, live tx hash
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) — end-to-end system design
- [docs/AGENTS.md](docs/AGENTS.md) — all 22 agents, weights, veto authority
- [docs/CONSTITUTION.md](docs/CONSTITUTION.md) — immutable system rules
- [docs/RISK_POLICY.md](docs/RISK_POLICY.md) — position caps and drawdown gates
- [docs/THESIS_SCHEMA.md](docs/THESIS_SCHEMA.md) — Boule output structure
- [docs/SIGNAL_SPEC.md](docs/SIGNAL_SPEC.md) — Apollo signal envelope
- [docs/TRACE_FORMAT.md](docs/TRACE_FORMAT.md) — TraceEvent per agent step
- [docs/SETTLEMENT_FLOW.md](docs/SETTLEMENT_FLOW.md) — on-chain settlement path
- [docs/MOIRAI_LAWS.md](docs/MOIRAI_LAWS.md) — strategy lifecycle rules

## What this project is

- A research prototype for **multi-agent deliberation as alpha**
- A **demonstration** of cryptographic restraint as a public good
- A hackathon-grade reference for **Arc Testnet** + **Polymarket** + **agent councils**
- A working **paper-trading** system end-to-end
- A working **on-chain restraint anchor** — first witness already recorded

## What this project is not

- Not financial advice
- Not a production trading bot with validated edge
- Not licensed for execution against retail capital
- Not battle-tested against adverse market makers
- Not regulated; Polymarket is geo-restricted in many jurisdictions
- Not running live execution by default — `EXECUTION_MODE=paper` is the default
